summary: Build a high-conversion website for a solar installation service company that turns homeowners and commercial buyers into qualified quote requests through low-friction communication paths.
audience: Commercial property owners evaluating energy-cost reduction
Facility and operations managers planning phased solar installations
goals: Generate qualified quote requests from every primary route
Make WhatsApp, call, and AI chat the fastest communication paths
Build trust through proof, financing clarity, and installation-process transparency
Preserve route differentiation across residential, commercial, financing, and contact pages
requestedFeatures: AI chat assistant for lead qualification
Case study and testimonial proof sections
